title: Reduce Workspace runtime surface

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Workspace is converted after Memory proves the pattern. Read-only and report-like commands are prioritized before routing and policy commands; generic deterministic Workspace behavior leaves workspace_runtime_primitives.py, while live inspection and routing judgment remain explicit Tier 2 debt.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: defaults tiny-router, compact-answer, and selected-output text now emit from the generated runtime facade instead of falling back to package output.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The existing defaults --section root_cli_authority --select answer.command --format text path crashed because package text output treated selected-output as a compact answer. Fixed directly by generated selected-output text emission.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: broader Workspace lane proof remains pending after additional slices
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
